extract: Glimmora (Japanese: キラフロル Kiraflor) is a dual-type Rock/Poison Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. It evolves from Glimmet starting at level 35. Glimmora can Mega Evolve into Mega Glimmora using the Glimmoranite. Mega Glimmora was introduced in the Mega Dimension DLC for Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
